task_completion.description: Log into the OpenClinica web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard or home screen is visible in a web browser, indicating successful login.
The active study displayed in the OpenClinica interface (typically at the top of the page or in the study selection menu) is 'DM-TRIAL-2024'.

task_completion.description: Locate the removed subject record for DM-106.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subject matrix or subject details page is visible, explicitly showing the subject ID 'DM-106'.

task_completion.description: Restore subject DM-106 to the 'Available' state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Subject 'DM-106' is shown with an 'Available' status (or equivalent active state icon/text) in the subject matrix or details page, indicating it is no longer 'Removed'.

task_completion.description: Locate the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event for subject DM-102.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subject matrix or event details page for subject 'DM-102' is visible, showing the 'Week 4 Follow-up' study event.

task_completion.description: Restore the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event for subject DM-102 to the 'Available' state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Week 4 Follow-up' event for subject 'DM-102' is shown with an 'Available' status (or equivalent active state icon/text) in the subject matrix or event details page, indicating it is no longer 'Removed'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with OpenClinica.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenClinica web interface inside a standard web browser, rather than terminal commands (like curl) being used to send HTTP requests.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no terminal window open showing direct PostgreSQL database queries (e.g., using psql to UPDATE status_id to 1).

integrity.description: The agent genuinely navigated the OpenClinica interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps of GUI navigation, such as viewing the Subject Matrix, clicking action icons, or confirming restoration prompts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Study: DM-TRIAL-2024. Target Subject to restore: DM-106. Target Event to restore: 'Week 4 Follow-up' for subject DM-102. Both the subject and the event start in a 'Removed' state (status_id 5) and must be restored to an 'Available' state (status_id 1) using the OpenClinica web interface.
